meta.title: Safety Gate Monitor for Shopify
meta.description: Safety Gate Monitor helps Shopify merchants catch risky products by comparing catalog items against the EU Safety Gate / RAPEX database.

hero.title: Catch risky products before they go live.
hero.lede: Safety Gate Monitor checks your Shopify catalog against the EU Safety Gate / RAPEX database and flags products that may match reported dangerous items.
points: Checks product text, brand, category, and images
Fits manual checks, bulk reviews, and product updates
Helps reduce complaints, returns, and trust issues

preview.label: Merchant view
preview.alert: Matched against a recalled toy listing in EU Safety Gate.
preview.action: Suggested action: review supplier docs before publishing.

items.title: Catch risky products early
items.body: Flag products that look too close to dangerous items already reported in EU Safety Gate.

items.title: Reduce manual review time
items.body: Run checks inside normal Shopify product workflows instead of relying on slow spreadsheet reviews.

items.title: Protect trust and revenue
items.body: Get earlier warnings before risky products trigger complaints, returns, or brand damage.

signals.title: A simple product safety check for Shopify stores.

steps.title: Import alert data
steps.body: The backend keeps Safety Gate records up to date and ready for matching.

steps.title: Check Shopify products
steps.body: New, updated, manual, and bulk checks all send product data into the matcher.

steps.title: Review the alert
steps.body: Merchants see the match context and can review, pause, or remove the product.

footer.title: Turn product safety into a repeatable Shopify workflow.

cta.title: Install the app in your Shopify store.
cta.body: Enter your myshopify.com domain to start the install flow.
cta.label: Shop domain

risk.title: A safety issue can cost more than one sale.

items.title: Fines and enforcement risk
items.body: Dangerous products can lead to regulatory scrutiny, forced removals, customer claims, and expensive operational cleanup.

items.title: Trust loss is harder to recover
items.body: Customers may forgive a shipping delay. They rarely forget a product safety problem tied to your store.
